### REQUEST ###

POST https://api2.cursor.sh:443/aiserver.v1.RepositoryService/FastUpdateFileV2 HTTP/1.1

Authorization: Bearer REDACTED
Connect-Protocol-Version: 1
Connect-Timeout-Ms: 180000
Connection: close
Content-Encoding: gzip
Content-Type: application/proto
Host: api2.cursor.sh
Traceparent: REDACTED

X-Amzn-Trace-Id: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Checksum: REDACTED

X-Cursor-Client-Device-Type: desktop
X-Cursor-Client-Os: win32
X-Cursor-Client-Type: ide
X-Cursor-Client-Version: 2.6.11
X-Cursor-Config-Version: REDACTED

X-Ghost-Mode: true

```














{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4842195278606858022
  },
  "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "4:LEN": {
    "1:LEN": {
      "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
      "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport asyncio\r\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\nfrom httpx import AsyncClient\r\nfrom redis.asyncio import Redis\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.exc import OperationalError\r\n\r\nfrom miniqueue.api_app import create_app\r\nfrom miniqueue.config import get_settings\r\nfrom miniqueue.db import init_db\r\nfrom miniqueue.scheduler import scheduler_loop\r\nfrom miniqueue.worker import ensure_group, worker_loop\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED\r\nasync def test_delayed_job_not_before_run_at_and_scheduler_restart(tmp_path, monkeypatch) -> None:\r\n    # Configure DB and Redis URL for local dockerized Redis.\r\n    db_path = tmp_path / \"jobs.db\"\r\n    monkeypatch.setenv(\"MINIQUEUE_DB_URL\", f\"sqlite+aiosqlite:///{db_path}\")\r\n    monkeypatch.setenv(\"MINIQUEUE_REDIS_URL\", \"redis://localhost:6379/0\")\r\n    monkeypatch.setenv(\"MINIQUEUE_SCHEDULER_INTERVAL_SEC\", \"1\")\r\n\r\n    # Skip if Redis is not available in this environment.\r\n    try:\r\n        client = Redis.from_url(\"redis://localhost:6379/0\")\r\n        await client.ping()\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        pytest.skip(\"Redis not available for integration test\")\r\n\r\n    app = create_app()\r\n    try:\r\n        await init_db()\r\n    except OperationalError:\r\n        pytest.skip(\"SQLite not available for integration test\")\r\n\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n    await ensure_group(settings.queue_default)\r\n\r\n    # Start a single worker and a scheduler loop.\r\n    async def worker_task() -> None:\r\n        await worker_loop(0, queue=settings.queue_default, consumer_name=\"test-worker\")\r\n\r\n    # Use an empty schedule list so only delayed jobs are processed.\r\n    schedules: list[object] = []\r\n\r\n    async def scheduler_task() -> None:\r\n        await scheduler_loop(schedules)\r\n\r\n    wt = asyncio.create_task(worker_task())\r\n    st = asyncio.create_task(scheduler_task())\r\n\r\n    async with AsyncClient(app=app, base_url=\"http://test\") as client:\r\n        run_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(seconds=3)\r\n        body = {\r\n            \"type\": \"sleep\",\r\n            \"payload\": {\"seconds\": 0.1},\r\n            \"run_at\": run_at.isoformat(),\r\n        }\r\n        resp = await client.post(\"/jobs\", json=body)\r\n        assert resp.status_code == 201\r\n        job_id = resp.json()[\"job_id\"]\r\n\r\n        # Ensure job does not complete before run_at.\r\n        pre_deadline = run_at - timedelta(seconds=1)\r\n        while datetime.now(timezone.utc) < pre_deadline:\r\n            r = await client.get(f\"/jobs/{job_id}\")\r\n            data = r.json()\r\n            assert data[\"state\"] in {\"QUEUED\", \"RUNNING\"}\r\n            await asyncio.sleep(0.5)\r\n\r\n        # Wait until after run_at and ensure completion.\r\n        deadline = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(seconds=10)\r\n        while datetime.now(timezone.utc) < deadline:\r\n            r = await client.get(f\"/jobs/{job_id}\")\r\n            data = r.json()\r\n            if data[\"state\"] == \"SUCCEEDED\":\r\n                break\r\n            await asyncio.sleep(0.5)\r\n        else:\r\n            pytest.fail(\"Job did not complete after run_at\")\r\n\r\n    # Cleanup tasks.\r\n    wt.cancel()\r\n    st.cancel()\r\n    await asyncio.gather(wt, st, return_exceptions=True)\r\n\r\n"
    },
    "2:LEN": "98f166556c3bf150da31d4f9c249721de01d996a9406af0b49fa60344d386492",
    "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
  },
  "5:LEN": [
    {
      "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
    },
    {
      "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
    },
    {
      "1:LEN": "."
    }
  ],
  "6:VARINT": 1
}
```

%2Bin%2Bthis%2Benvironment.%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Btry%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bclient%2B%253D%2BRedis.from_url%2528%255C%2522redis%253A%252F%252Flocalhost%253A6379%252F0%255C%2522%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bawait%2Bclient.ping%2528%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bexcept%2BException%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bpytest.skip%2528%255C%2522Redis%2Bnot%2Bavailable%2Bfor%2Bintegration%2Btest%255C%2522%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bapp%2B%253D%2Bcreate_app%2528%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Btry%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bawait%2Binit_db%2528%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bexcept%2BOperationalError%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bpytest.skip%2528%255C%2522SQLite%2Bnot%2Bavailable%2Bfor%2Bintegration%2Btest%255C%2522%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bsettings%2B%253D%2Bget_settings%2528%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bawait%2Bensure_group%2528settings.queue_default%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2523%2BStart%2Ba%2Bsingle%2Bworker%2Band%2Ba%2Bscheduler%2Bloop.%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bdef%2Bworker_task%2528%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BNone%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bawait%2Bworker_loop%25280%252C%2Bqueue%253Dsettings.queue_default%252C%2Bconsumer_name%253D%255C%2522test-worker%255C%2522%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2523%2BUse%2Ban%2Bempty%2Bschedule%2Blist%2Bso%2Bonly%2Bdelayed%2Bjobs%2Bare%2Bprocessed.%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bschedules%253A%2Blist%255Bobject%255D%2B%253D%2B%255B%255D%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bdef%2Bscheduler_task%2528%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BNone%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bawait%2Bscheduler_loop%2528schedules%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bwt%2B%253D%2Basyncio.create_task%2528worker_task%2528%2529%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bst%2B%253D%2Basyncio.create_task%2528scheduler_task%2528%2529%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bwith%2BAsyncClient%2528app%253Dapp%252C%2Bbase_url%253D%255C%2522http%253A%252F%252Ftest%255C%2522%2529%2Bas%2Bclient%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Brun_at%2B%253D%2Bdatetime.now%2528timezone.utc%2529%2B%2B%2Btimedelta%2528seconds%253D3%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bbody%2B%253D%2B%257B%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522type%255C%2522%253A%2B%255C%2522sleep%255C%2522%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522payload%255C%2522%253A%2B%257B%255C%2522seconds%255C%2522%253A%2B0.1%257D%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522run_at%255C%2522%253A%2Brun_at.isoformat%2528%2529%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%257D%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bresp%2B%253D%2Bawait%2Bclient.post%2528%255C%2522%252Fjobs%255C%2522%252C%2Bjson%253Dbody%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bresp.status_code%2B%253D%253D%2B201%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bjob_id%2B%253D%2Bresp.json%2528%2529%255B%255C%2522job_id%255C%2522%255D%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2523%2BEnsure%2Bjob%2Bdoes%2Bnot%2Bcomplete%2Bbefore%2Brun_at.%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bpre_deadline%2B%253D%2Brun_at%2B-%2Btimedelta%2528seconds%253D1%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bwhile%2Bdatetime.now%2528timezone.utc%2529%2B%255Cu003c%2Bpre_deadline%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Br%2B%253D%2Bawait%2Bclient.get%2528f%255C%2522%252Fjobs%252F%257Bjob_id%257D%255C%2522%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bdata%2B%253D%2Br.json%2528%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bdata%255B%255C%2522state%255C%2522%255D%2Bin%2B%257B%255C%2522QUEUED%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522RUNNING%255C%2522%257D%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bawait%2Basyncio.sleep%25280.5%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2523%2BWait%2Buntil%2Bafter%2Brun_at%2Band%2Bensure%2Bcompletion.%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bdeadline%2B%253D%2Bdatetime.now%2528timezone.utc%2529%2B%2B%2Btimedelta%2528seconds%253D10%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bwhile%2Bdatetime.now%2528timezone.utc%2529%2B%255Cu003c%2Bdeadline%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Br%2B%253D%2Bawait%2Bclient.get%2528f%255C%2522%252Fjobs%252F%257Bjob_id%257D%255C%2522%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bdata%2B%253D%2Br.json%2528%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bif%2Bdata%255B%255C%2522state%255C%2522%255D%2B%253D%253D%2B%255C%2522SUCCEEDED%255C%2522%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bbreak%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bawait%2Basyncio.sleep%25280.5%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Belse%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bpytest.fail%2528%255C%2522Job%2Bdid%2Bnot%2Bcomplete%2Bafter%2Brun_at%255C%2522%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2523%2BCleanup%2Btasks.%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bwt.cancel%2528%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bst.cancel%2528%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bawait%2Basyncio.gather%2528wt%252C%2Bst%252C%2Breturn_exceptions%253DTrue%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2522%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%252298f166556c3bf150da31d4f9c249721de01d996a9406af0b49fa60344d386492%2522%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%25225%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%2522%257D%255D%252C%25226%253AVARINT%2522%253A1%257D
